scripts.build: pnpm build:web && pnpm build:sdk && pnpm embed:webassets
scripts.check: pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm fmt:check
scripts.coverage: go test ./apps/api/internal/... -coverprofile=coverage.out && grep -v -e '/storedb/' -e '/store/postgres/' coverage.out > coverage.filtered.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.filtered.out > coverage.txt && cat coverage.txt && awk 'BEGIN { found=0 } /^total:/ { found=1; sub(/%/, "", $3); if ($3 + 0 < 90) exit 1 } END { if (!found) exit 1 }' coverage.txt
scripts.lint: oxlint apps/web/src packages/sdk-ts/src examples tests/e2e playwright.config.ts
scripts.test: pnpm build:web && pnpm build:sdk && node scripts/go-test-with-web-dist.mjs
